description: Nuwa Labs sells the Nuwa Pen, a connected pen for digitizing handwritten notes and interacting with them through companion software. Its public website is a Shopify-powered storefront with agent-facing commerce and discovery endpoints.
summary: Nuwa exposes an OAuth-protected MCP server at https://mcp.nuwapen.com/ plus public HTTP discovery and read-only storefront endpoints on nuwapen.com.
